name: Void Rift
description: A multiplayer Co-op and PvP MOBA (Multiplayer Online Battle Arena) game featuring complex class abilities and real-time networking.
highlights: Developed authoritative multiplayer synchronization using Mirror to handle server-validated PvP matches and actions.
Engineered a real-time weapon and skill inventory system, allowing players to dynamically equip and update active abilities mid-game.
Created modular combat state machines synchronizing real-time skill execution and server-side damage validation.
